In rerun::external::re_renderer::external::smallvec::alloc::fmt

rerun::external::re_renderer::external::smallvec::alloc::fmt

Function format

1.36.0 · Source 
pub fn format(args: Arguments<'_>) -> String
Expand description

Takes an Arguments struct and returns the resulting formatted string.

The Arguments instance can be created with the format_args! macro.

§Examples

Basic usage:

use std::fmt;

let s = fmt::format(format_args!("Hello, {}!", "world"));
assert_eq!(s, "Hello, world!");

Please note that using format! might be preferable. Example:

let s = format!("Hello, {}!", "world");
assert_eq!(s, "Hello, world!");
